title: Chamaeclitandra henriquesiana

This plant is classified under the order Gentianales and the class Magnoliopsida. Chamaeclitandra henriquesiana is also classified under the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. The classification of Chamaeclitandra henriquesiana is further divided into the genus Chamaeclitandra.
